excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE is a validated RoPE replacement
supported: A deterministic multi-initialization nonlinear full-context retrieval bridge on Stage 12 non-phase-cued rows.
A direct follow-up to the Stage 31 simple-attention failure that tests richer PhaseWrap-derived features.
Confidence intervals over initialization seeds and explicit weak-run reporting.

model.trained_parameters: feature-to-hidden weights, hidden bias, hidden-to-attention-logit weights, logit bias

task.description: Full-prefix non-phase-cued retrieval over Stage 12 rows with a nonlinear feature bridge.
task.scope: This is a full-context retrieval feature bridge, not a full decoder-only language-model benchmark.
task.target_construction: Targets are selected by explicit retrieval rules, not by the PhaseWrap score.
